def negative_relative_import_crossing_sibling_package_boundary():
    rule_id = "relative_import_crossing_sibling_package_boundary"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Relative import uses three or more dots, crossing into a sibling package boundary."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
